archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon) tailored to 'Retro-Futurism / Cyber-Brutalism' blending with 'Swiss & High-Contrast'
design_philosophy: Authoritative, technical, and polished. $15,000 hand-crafted feel. Generous whitespace, zero clutter, deep contrast. A showcase of precision and scale.

hierarchy.mono_label: font-mono text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#00E5FF]
hierarchy.tech_tag: font-mono text-xs tracking-wider text-[#A1A1AA] bg-white/5 px-2 py-1

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter).
Overlines and labels must use JetBrains Mono, uppercase, wide tracking.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serifs for headings.

grid_patterns.experience_timeline: border-l border-white/10 ml-4 md:ml-0 pl-8 md:pl-12 relative

rules: Use massive spacing between sections (py-32) to let the content breathe.
Embrace asymmetry where possible (e.g., offset project cards).

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-[#0A0A0A] font-mono uppercase text-sm font-bold tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white font-mono uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4 hover:border-[#00E5FF] hover:text-[#00E5FF] transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5

cards_projects.base: group relative bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 p-8 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden transition-colors duration-500 hover:border-white/20
cards_projects.hover_effect: A subtle radial gradient glow of #00E5FF tracking the mouse cursor (or simply appearing on hover) behind the card.

timeline_item.dot: absolute -left-[5px] top-2 w-[10px] h-[10px] bg-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#00E5FF] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)]

contact_form.input: w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 p-4 text-white font-mono text-sm focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-all placeholder-white/30

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling mandatory (implement via Lenis or similar smooth scroll wrapper).
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for timeline items and project cards. Initial y: 20, opacity: 0, transition: { duration: 0.6, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must have explicit color shifts. Text links shift to #00E5FF.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Use 'Tracing Beam' or dynamic glowing border effects on the Hero section or key feature cards.

profile_photo.alt: Alex Chen - Senior Software Engineer portrait in moody lighting
profile_photo.usage_rules: Use heavily desaturated or grayscale with a subtle #00E5FF duotone or mixed blend mode to fit the dark tech aesthetic.

media_and_assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for crisp, minimalist UI icons. Ensure stroke-width is 1.5 for a sharp, refined look.

testing_and_accessibility.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="hero-cta-contact"', 'data-testid="download-resume-button"').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Text contrast must meet APCA or WCAG AA standards. Ensure gray body text (#A1A1AA) against black (#0A0A0A) passes legibility checks.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Google Fonts: 'Outfit' for main headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for monospace elements.
Do NOT use standard HTML inputs. Build the contact form with semantic inputs styled identically to Shadcn's minimalist dark inputs, or use Shadcn directly.
Build a custom pure HTML+Tailwind layout for the sections to guarantee E1's required generous spacing (e.g., gap-12, py-32).
For the Hero section, emphasize typography. The name 'Alex Chen' should be massive (h1). The tagline should be h2 or a very large, readable paragraph.
Do not use generic 'card' layouts for experience. The vertical timeline MUST be precise, using border-l and glowing cyan dots as specified.
Do NOT use placeholder texts or dummy images. Use the provided high-end abstract dark tech geometric images for project thumbnails.
